title: Can I see all the automations that other users have set up on their boards?
excerpt:
Hi 
We deactivated a team members account, am I able to view the automations that were either set up by that person or set up to notify that person by someone else? I do not know which boards on our account any automatio…

posts.author: officemanager (Ruth Mackey)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi

We deactivated a team members account, am I able to view the automations that were either set up by that person or set up to notify that person by someone else? I do not know which boards on our account any automations would have been set up by or for this user, but I need to ensure that we aren’t missing anything important.

posts.author: lauralev (Laura Levy)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @officemanager! Right now, the best way to see this is from the account usage tab but it will not give you the granular information you’re looking for. I’d love to increase the transparency here so I will pass this onto our product team to consider implementing. Let me know if you have more ideas - we’d love to improve in this area! Cheers!
